user.title: BeeBuzz
user.description: Set up BeeBuzz to send end-to-end encrypted push notifications.

data_description.host: Use 'beebuzz.app' for the official service or enter a custom API URL (e.g. https://api.example.com).
Use 'beebuzz.app' for the official service or enter a custom API URL (e.g. https://api.example.com).
data_description.api_token: Leave empty to keep the current token.

reauth_confirm.title: BeeBuzz authentication
reauth_confirm.description: The BeeBuzz API token was rejected. Provide a new token to continue.

no_devices_paired.title: No BeeBuzz devices paired
no_devices_paired.description: BeeBuzz has no paired devices, so notifications cannot be delivered. Open the BeeBuzz app on at least one device and pair it with this account.

keys_refresh_failed.title: BeeBuzz device key refresh failing
keys_refresh_failed.description: Home Assistant has been unable to refresh BeeBuzz device keys for several consecutive attempts. Check that the BeeBuzz API host is reachable and that the API token is valid.

authentication_error.message: The BeeBuzz API token was rejected.

send_message.name: Send a BeeBuzz message
send_message.description: Sends an end-to-end encrypted notification to all paired BeeBuzz devices.

attachment.name: Attachment
attachment.description: Optional attachment: local path, media-source URI, http(s) URL, or object with url/path/file.
